ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "total_grant_amount" TEXT /* Total grant amount awarded for the project */,
  "total_project_value" TEXT /* Total value of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project, including objectives, innovations, and expected outcomes */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the project belongs to (e.g., healthcare, environmental sustainability, agriculture) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "expected_completion_date" TEXT /* Expected completion date of the project */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual completion date of the project */,
  "budget_variance" TEXT /* Difference between the total grant amount and the actual expenses */,
  "project_leader" TEXT /* Primary contact or leader of the project */,
  "impact_statement" TEXT /* Summary of the project's impact on the industry and society */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* Additional collaborators or stakeholders involved in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partners" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partner */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the partner is involved in */,
  "partner_name" TEXT /* Name of the partner */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the partner in the project */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email contact for the partner */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone contact for the partner */,
  "contribution_amount" TEXT /* Financial contribution of the partner */,
  "contribution_description" TEXT /* Description of the partner's contribution (e.g., financial, technical, resources) */,
  "engagement_level" TEXT /* Level of involvement of the partner (e.g., primary, secondary, tertiary) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the partner joined the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the partner's involvement in the project ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partners_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, researcher, government official) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email contact for the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone contact for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each project
